title: Deploy Multi-Container Docker Stack
description: Developer wants to deploy a Docker Compose stack with multiple services including a web app, API, and worker processes.
prompt: I have a docker-compose.yml file for my application that has a web frontend, API backend, and background worker. Can you help me deploy this as a container stack on mittwald? I need all three services running and connected.

questionAnswers.answer: Use the docker-compose.yml from the repo
